command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '=CANONICAL_JOB_STATE='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/run-20260623T035337Z-b387b3b4/run-state.json 2>/dev/null
echo '---'
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/run-20260623T035337Z-b387b3b4/request.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=BG_STATE='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/run-state.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=BG_PID='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/worker-pid.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=BG_ERR='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/phase-error.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=CTRL_JOBS_COUNT='
ls memory/phase-controller/jobs/ | wc -l
echo '=CTRL_STATE='
cat memory/phase-controller/controller.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=PREV_RUN='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/run-20260622T161736Z-ef245fe9/request.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=GOVERNED_DIR_TOP='
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/
ENDSSH
